texto: before men could speak they enjoyed confounding another with signsthey enjoyed this as much as a mirror enjoys an imageas much as the evening like a ship enjoys a sapphire grave
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Frank Stanford: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “before men could speak they enjoyed confounding another with signsthey enjoyed this as much as a …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, language, enjoyed pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
